---
title: "Upper"
format: html
editor: visual
---

3,652m

Pine tree zone!

The distinction between fir and pine trees has a ritual significance. Pine trees had a lot of ritual uses. Pine resin was a religious offering and had various medicinal uses. In book 11 of the Florentine Codex:

*"pine is embracing. It is a provider of light, a means of seeing."*

Pine was often used for ceremonial fires. This area was also abundant in whitetail deer, a common food source for the Nahua. Because of this was a habitat for the deer, the Nahua interpreted the area as very fertile and life-giving.
